rows: Born from a pesent woman who was being used as a kolduic sacrafice. You were taught the ways of the spritis your entire life, the ways of the father clan were not easy. Sometimes you would have to go for days without food and then only when you had done some task you would be given vampiric blood to keep you sustained. Centruies past. One day you were patroling the hinterlands of your master domain, and a party of robbed induviuals came with all the proper tradions of hospitality on their lips. Your sire met them in private. But from through the walls you heard the comradery that was being experessed. Before the guests left they came to you, and said that you could come with them. To see the world of the spirit and the dead, to be a servant to the fathers fathers. You jumped at the chance to see anything outside of the domain. The Tal'mahe'Ra had bought you. You learned of the shadow crusade and your time in enoch changed you. You where now a servant of the Aralu and their grandfather Cain. All vampires who did not subit to this calling, will be destroyed in time. One night in the salons of the city of cain, a True Brujha challeged you. How can you say you are a servant of the Aralu, when you do not fight their enemies? You do not purge the week from the blood of cain? You took the challange and left the lands of the dead the next night. Joining the sabbat, you saw all your fears. The souleaten were everywhere, the depraviaty of the sect was only shown more intense with their pention for infernalism. But you presrvered you took a group close to you and made the Spear of Enoch. Haveing the True Brujha be your connection to the city of the dead you took orders from. Then came the week of nightmares, Ravnos killed by mages the aralu did not stur.. At the moment the armys were ready to strike communcation stopped. This had been prepared for, You kept the line. Then came leaving of the assamites, and the purging of the false hand. You still kept the line. You don't have a way to return to enoch, so all you can do it try to rebuild the sect from your cell of followers.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
